Store Builder System

Autonomous Shopify store creation and optimization pipeline

Core Feature
Build Pipeline
1

Research Market

Analyze competitors, trends, winning products

research.query

Serper/Tavily

2

Generate Brand

Create brand name, story, identity

ai.generate_text

OpenAI

3

Generate Logo

Create logo assets

ai.generate_image

DALL-E/Midjourney

4

Choose Theme

Select and customize Shopify theme

shopify.theme

Shopify API

5

Import Products

Import from AutoDS to Shopify

autods.import_product

AutoDS + Shopify

6

Optimize Listings

SEO titles, descriptions, tags

ai.generate_text

OpenAI

7

Create Collections

Organize products into collections

shopify.create_collection

Shopify API

8

Build Homepage

Generate sections, banners, content

shopify.update_theme

Shopify API

9

Create Pages

About, Contact, Policy pages

shopify.create_page

Shopify API

10

SEO Optimization

Meta tags, structured data

shopify.update_product

Shopify API

11

Marketing Assets

Ad creatives, social graphics

ai.generate_image

OpenAI

12

Quality Checks

Validate store completeness

shopify.validate

Shopify API

Shopify API Operations
create_productCreate new product with variants
update_productUpdate product details
create_collectionCreate smart/custom collection
update_collectionModify collection rules
create_pageCreate CMS page
update_themeModify theme settings
create_blogCreate blog post
create_metafieldAdd custom data
AutoDS Integration
search_productsSearch supplier catalog
import_productImport to Shopify
update_priceSync pricing changes
sync_inventoryUpdate stock levels
monitor_supplierTrack availability
auto_replaceReplace out-of-stock
Automation Rules

Product Import

Trigger:

New winning product found

Action:

Auto-import to Shopify

Approval:

Required unless auto-mode

Price Sync

Trigger:

Supplier price change

Action:

Update Shopify price

Approval:

Auto if within margin

Inventory Sync

Trigger:

Stock level change

Action:

Update Shopify inventory

Approval:

Always automatic
